articles.title: Your CVR Is Up But Revenue Isn't: The RPS+CVR Fix for EC Ad Budgets
articles.description: Increasing budget on a high-CVR ad and revenue stays flat is a common EC mistake. The cause is CVR being used as the sole judgment metric. RPS (Revenue Per Session) is the missing axis — here is how the CVR-RPS divergence breaks budget decisions and a 4-quadrant framework to fix it.
